args:
set -eu
[ -f vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/transport.rs ]
[ -f vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/nixl_integration/test_edge_cases.py ]
rg -n 'START_DP_WAVE|output frame|expected 2 frames|decode output message' vllm/rust/src/engine-core-client/src/transport.rs >/dev/null
rg -n 'partition|edge case' vllm/tests/v1/kv_connector/nixl_integration/test_edge_cases.py >/dev/null
printf 'vllm-transport-partition-events\n'
